title: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban
posterAlt: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban (2004) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Harry Potter's life is in danger once more as dangerous wizard Sirius Black has escaped from Azkaban Prison and is heading to Hogwarts.
synopsis: Released in 2004, Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban is a adventure and fantasy film from United Kingdom and United States. It holds a solid 7.9 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2000s and genre rankings. It carries a PG certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
